structured.title: Family Plans Quick Shop And Dinner
structured.overview: The conversation focuses on immediate family logistics: someone needs to head to Lidl for a quick shop, possibly buy a simple meal to save time, and get back in time for everyone to eat. They discuss lunch and tea options, including pizza, chips, sushi, pasta, and Thai curry, but several ideas are rejected because they want something quick and not too rice-heavy. There is also talk about messaging parents to say that Judah will be going, and Elliot is told to stay at home and remain in his room from about 7:00 to 10:00.

action_items.description: Message parents that Judith will be going

events.title: Elliot Stays Home Tonight
events.description: Elliot is expected to stay in his room from 19:00 to 22:00.

apps_results.content:
## Plans to go out
- One person planned to go to Lidl.
- Another needed to get back by dinner.
- Bags were moved; leaving was delayed.

## Lunch and food
- Lunch was pizza and chips.
- They considered sushi from the shop.
- Fast meal ideas were suggested.

## Dinner ideas
- Chunky pasta was suggested.
- Thai curry was discussed.
- Rice was rejected by one person.

## Timing and errands
- Shop run needed to stay quick.
- One person might do it tomorrow.
- A steroid was mentioned as possible help.

## Next steps
- Message parents that only Judah is going.
- Elliot should stay in his room.
- Stay there from 07:00 to 10:00.
